domain: AI-enhanced chemical imaging methods for dynamic monitoring of protein-protein interactions

subspaces.name: AI-augmented super-resolution microscopy
subspaces.description: Integration of deep learning (e.g., CNNs, diffusion models) into structured illumination, STORM, PALM, and MINFLUX to enhance resolution, temporal fidelity, and signal recovery in live-cell PPI imaging.
subspaces.probe_query: STORM reconstruction deep localization microscopy nanoscale PPI tracking motion-corrected SRM fluorophore blinking AI modeling

subspaces.name: FRET/BRET dynamics quantification with AI
aliases: 荧光共振能量转移AI分析
subspaces.description: AI-driven spectral unmixing, lifetime deconvolution, and conformational state inference from time-resolved FRET/BRET data to resolve transient, stoichiometrically heterogeneous PPIs in situ.
subspaces.probe_query: FRET efficiency deep estimation photon-limited BRET deconvolution multi-exponential FLIM-AI donor-acceptor crosstalk correction PPI dwell-time prediction

subspaces.name: Self-supervised denoising for low-light chemical imaging
subspaces.description: Application of self-supervised or unsupervised deep learning (e.g., Noise2Void, CARE, DnCNN variants) to recover molecular interaction signals from ultra-low-photon, high-speed chemical imaging modalities without ground-truth training data.
subspaces.probe_query: photon-starved FLIM denoising live-cell FCS-AI preprocessing zero-shot spectral denoising temporal self-consistency learning quantum-limited probe imaging

subspaces.name: Multimodal correlative chemical imaging
subspaces.description: AI-coordinated fusion of fluorescence lifetime, Raman, mass spectrometry (e.g., MALDI-IMS), and electron microscopy data to map PPIs across spatial scales and chemical dimensions.
subspaces.probe_query: FLIM-MALDI alignment spatial proteomics registration AI Raman-fluorescence spectral co-registration cross-modality PPI embedding subcellular multimodal atlas

subspaces.name: Chemical probe-aware AI reconstruction
subspaces.description: AI models explicitly encoding photophysical properties (bleaching kinetics, quantum yield, Stokes shift, environmental sensitivity) of chemical probes (e.g., HaloTag ligands, SNAP-tags, dyes) to improve quantitative PPI inference.
subspaces.probe_query: HaloTag-AI forward model environment-sensitive dye physics embedding photobleaching-aware deconvolution pH/viscosity-aware FLIM probe-specific noise modeling

subspaces.name: Spatiotemporal deep learning for PPI dynamics
subspaces.description: Recurrent, transformer, or graph neural networks trained on time-lapse chemical imaging data to infer interaction onset, duration, cooperativity, and subcellular trafficking patterns of protein complexes.
subspaces.probe_query: PPI state transition modeling interaction graph evolution live-cell interaction LSTM co-localization temporal embedding complex assembly forecasting

subspaces.name: AI-enabled spatial proteomics integration
subspaces.description: Deep learning frameworks that jointly interpret chemical imaging-derived PPI maps with spatially resolved proteomic data (e.g., GeoMx, Visium, MIBI-TOF) to infer functional interaction networks at tissue-level resolution.
subspaces.probe_query: GeoMx-PPI alignment multiplexed IF + proteomics joint embedding spatial interaction signature extraction tissue-contextual PPI inference domain-aware protein co-expression modeling

subspaces.name: Causal inference for PPI regulation
subspaces.description: Causal machine learning (e.g., structural causal models, invariant risk minimization) applied to perturbation-integrated chemical imaging (e.g., optogenetic, drug, CRISPRi) to infer regulatory drivers and directionality of dynamic interactions.
subspaces.probe_query: optogenetic perturbation AI interventional FLIM analysis causal PPI graph discovery do-calculus for imaging knockdown-conditioned interaction modeling

user_interaction.question: Select the subspaces to prioritize before ZhiZhi imports papers. You can also add custom subspaces.

options.label: AI-augmented super-resolution microscopy
options.description: Integration of deep learning (e.g., CNNs, diffusion models) into structured illumination, STORM, PALM, and MINFLUX to enhance resolution, temporal fidelity, and signal recovery in live-cell PPI imaging.

options.label: FRET/BRET dynamics quantification with AI
options.description: AI-driven spectral unmixing, lifetime deconvolution, and conformational state inference from time-resolved FRET/BRET data to resolve transient, stoichiometrically heterogeneous PPIs in situ.

options.label: Self-supervised denoising for low-light chemical imaging
options.description: Application of self-supervised or unsupervised deep learning (e.g., Noise2Void, CARE, DnCNN variants) to recover molecular interaction signals from ultra-low-photon, high-speed chemical imaging modalities without ground-truth training data.

options.label: Multimodal correlative chemical imaging
options.description: AI-coordinated fusion of fluorescence lifetime, Raman, mass spectrometry (e.g., MALDI-IMS), and electron microscopy data to map PPIs across spatial scales and chemical dimensions.

options.label: Chemical probe-aware AI reconstruction
options.description: AI models explicitly encoding photophysical properties (bleaching kinetics, quantum yield, Stokes shift, environmental sensitivity) of chemical probes (e.g., HaloTag ligands, SNAP-tags, dyes) to improve quantitative PPI inference.

options.label: Spatiotemporal deep learning for PPI dynamics
options.description: Recurrent, transformer, or graph neural networks trained on time-lapse chemical imaging data to infer interaction onset, duration, cooperativity, and subcellular trafficking patterns of protein complexes.

options.label: AI-enabled spatial proteomics integration
options.description: Deep learning frameworks that jointly interpret chemical imaging-derived PPI maps with spatially resolved proteomic data (e.g., GeoMx, Visium, MIBI-TOF) to infer functional interaction networks at tissue-level resolution.

options.label: Causal inference for PPI regulation
options.description: Causal machine learning (e.g., structural causal models, invariant risk minimization) applied to perturbation-integrated chemical imaging (e.g., optogenetic, drug, CRISPRi) to infer regulatory drivers and directionality of dynamic interactions.

custom_subspace_input.placeholder: e.g. Demand Response; EV Charging Coordination; Building Energy Management
custom_subspace_input.instructions: If your target subfield is not listed, provide one subspace per line or semicolon-separated. These will be converted into custom retrieval branches.

user_interaction.continue_with: Pass subspace_map_id plus selected_subfields, or pass option labels as focus_branches to run_zhizhi_literature_analysis.
